nodes.name: .graphify_labels.json
nodes.summary: Graphify community label index mapping numeric community IDs (0–142) to their string labels, used by the graphify analysis tool to annotate the knowledge graph output.

nodes.name: GRAPH_REPORT.md
nodes.summary: Comprehensive graphify analysis report for the family-events-backend codebase covering 1774 nodes, 3154 edges, and 143 detected communities with community hubs, god nodes, surprising connections, and knowledge gaps as of 2026-06-12.
nodes.languageNotes: Generated markdown report from graphify tool; 134 sections covering community breakdown for all 125 of the 143 detected communities.

nodes.name: cost.json
nodes.summary: Graphify run cost tracking file recording token usage and file counts per analysis run; shows one run on 2026-06-12 that processed 381 files with zero LLM token cost (pure structural extraction).

nodes.name: graph.html
nodes.summary: Interactive HTML visualization of the graphify knowledge graph, rendering the project's node-edge graph in a browser using embedded JavaScript and the graph.json data source.

nodes.name: graph.json
nodes.summary: Full graphify knowledge graph data file containing 1774 nodes, 3154 directed edges, hyperedges, and community assignments for the entire family-events-backend codebase, produced by graphify v0.8.38.
nodes.languageNotes: 51,527-line JSON file in NetworkX node-link format with directed multigraph; nodes start at line 9 and links at line 18315.

nodes.name: manifest.json
nodes.summary: Graphify file manifest cataloging all 381 source files analyzed in the family-events-backend codebase with their absolute paths, used by the graphify tool to track corpus membership and incremental analysis.
